free_text: Total reaction cross section and elastic scattering
of 24.7 MeV alpha particles in the region of A=60
delta E=0.6 MeV for 25 MeV alpha) to measure the beam
intensity before attenuation in transmission method

than the range of 25 MeV alpha) to measure the beam
intensity after attenuation in transmission method
product detection between 15 deg and 155 deg
- charged reaction products detected by the CsI(Tl)
- elastic scattering with outgoing alpha undetected
